name: @hauntapi/mcp-server
description: Extract clean, structured data from any URL — directly from Claude, Cursor, or any MCP-compatible AI. Handles JavaScript rendering and Cloudflare bypass automatically.

tools.name: extract_url
tools.description: Extract clean, structured data from any URL. Handles JavaScript rendering and Cloudflare bypass automatically.

tools.name: extract_batch
tools.description: Extract from multiple URLs at once (up to 10). Returns structured data for each URL.

tools.name: extract_metadata
tools.description: Pull metadata: title, description, Open Graph tags, Twitter cards, canonical URL.
